steps.title: Find the key signal
steps.content: Researchers gained new banking records from under-researched regions (Africa, Eastern Europe) after acknowledging a shortcoming. The word describes what they do to this previous limitation with their expanded data.

steps.title: Match the meaning
steps.content: ”Ameliorate” means to improve or remedy. With new data from Africa and Eastern Europe, researchers improve the previous geographic shortcoming of their research—that's exactly what “ameliorate” expresses. The other three don't fit: “sanction” (permit/penalize), “postulate” (assume/propose), and “rationalize” (explain away/justify) all fail to express how new data remedies a research limitation. That matches choice C — C is correct.
